environment.estimated_tree_compute_budget_source: os.cpu_count approximation of available_parallelism - 2 policy; not the binary's reported effective pool size

collector.order: direct-relay on odd runs; relay-direct on even runs

commands.cold_start: hyperfine --warmup 3 --runs 20 --shell zsh --export-json /tmp/kakehashi-phase0-cold.json 'python3 benches/profile/drive.py --bin /Users/atusy/ghq/github.com/atusy/kakehashi___worker_adr/target/release/kakehashi --data-dir /Users/atusy/ghq/github.com/atusy/kakehashi/deps/test/kakehashi --lang rust --size 15 --requests 1 --settle 0 >/dev/null 2>&1' 'KAKEHASHI_WORKER_PROXY_BIN=/Users/atusy/ghq/github.com/atusy/kakehashi___worker_adr/target/release/kakehashi python3 benches/profile/drive.py --bin ./benches/profile/worker_proxy.py --data-dir /Users/atusy/ghq/github.com/atusy/kakehashi/deps/test/kakehashi --lang rust --size 15 --requests 1 --settle 0 >/dev/null 2>&1'

artifacts.verification: parser metadata and every installed query byte-matched
